content: The intrinsic reward signals that power curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be re-framed as a dynamic gating mechanism for episodic memory storage in transformer agents, where only surprising, prediction-error-rich experiences triggered by curiosity are encoded into the agent's long-term episodic memory bank.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
